MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS PETER A. BAGATELOS AND BAGATELOS LAW FIRM'S MOTION TO STRIKE (COMPLAINT) AND REQUEST FOR ATTORNEYS' FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 436.
APPEARANCES: Brian Murphy O'Flynn, 867-4370 pltf & opposing party in propria persona; Jason E. Fellner, Esq. of Murphy, Pearson, Bradley & Feeney 788-1900 for defts & moving parties. (The Court made a disclosure that deft's atty, Jason Fellner, previously worked as a law clerk with the Court.)
RULING: The Court vacated its tentative ruling and granted plaintiff's request to continue the matter in order to file an opposition. Plaintiff to file opposition by 12/13/07; any reply to be filed by 12/18/07; matter continued to 12/20/07. (302/PJM) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
